start.title: First Salary
start.text: Your first paycheck of $30,000 just hit your account! This is the moment you've been waiting for. How will you allocate it?
start.speaker: Narrator

choices.text: Splurge! New lifestyle, here I come
choices.mentorText: Living the high life feels good, but spending 30% of your salary on non-essentials immediately is risky!
Excellent choice! An emergency fund is the shield that protects your financial future.
Investing early is the best way to utilize compound interest. Let's see how it goes.

budget_intro.title: The Grocery Dilemma
budget_intro.text: You're at the supermarket. Organic imports look tempting, but the generic brands are much cheaper. You also have a gym membership renewal due.
budget_intro.speaker: Narrator

choices.text: Go organic and renew the gym
choices.mentorText: Health is wealth, but be mindful of your monthly recurring expenses. They add up!

choices.text: Stick to basics and skip the gym for now
choices.mentorText: Budgeting requires sacrifices. You're building a strong financial discipline.

investment_phase.title: The Market Opportunity
investment_phase.text: A new tech IPO is generating massive hype. Some say it's the next big thing, others say it's a bubble. What's your play?
investment_phase.speaker: Mentor

choices.text: Go all in on the IPO
choices.mentorText: IPO investing is pure speculation. You could strike gold or lose it all.
Slow and steady wins the race. Index funds are the backbone of many successful portfolios.

scam_threat.title: Urgent Security Alert
scam_threat.text: You receive an email from your 'bank' stating your account has been compromised. It asks you to click a link and verify your credentials immediately.
scam_threat.speaker: Narrator

choices.mentorText: Oh no! That was a phishing scam. Never click links in unexpected security alerts.

choices.text: Ignore and report to official bank app
choices.mentorText: Great job spotting the scam! Cybersecurity is a critical part of financial security.

game_end.title: Quest Complete
game_end.text: You've navigated the first month of your financial journey. Your choices have defined your future. Let's see your final ROI!
game_end.speaker: Narrator
